When we look at the way people use their money or time, they can see things in a new way. Imagine you have some money in your hand. If you get more money out of a large room, you will feel good. But if you already have much, you will think and feel like you must keep giving away more. You might think that because you already gave away a big pile of money, you cannot stop now. This thought makes you want to give away even more money to finish the thing you started.

This is a problem for how we make choices. If we have ten pieces of money, we might act in a way that is not the same as if we start acting different ways. The first piece of money is gone. It does not matter if we spend ten more pieces of money on the ground or the stones we now own. That piece of money will still be for nothing. However, the second piece of money matters less. One way to know when this happens is to keep a write down of the very first words. If you can, you can look at the writing and see if there is any part that was not in the write. If something was left out, you can ask the person to say the whole thing again, or you can ask other people who heard the first part. If the new words are the same as the first ones, then the words are still the same. If any words were added, taken away, or changed, then the people who hear think the words have been changed.

a good way to be sure is to watch for a while and notice if the tone or feeling of the talk changes. When the voice sounds like it wants one way and the words feel like they want another, that is a sign that the speaker has made a move to a new place. You can also ask the person why they chose to say the words in a new way, and see if they have an answer that fits with what they want. If they do not give a good answer, you can be sure they are changing what was really said.

We see a person who keeps doing things that help other people or make things feel good. Because the brain likes to know what will happen next, it can use the more often it has seen the thing, the more the brain believes the thing will keep coming.

a second point to this idea is about how the brain looks at the future. The brain looks back at the many times something like that has happened before. If the brain sees the same kind of thing over and over, it thinks that the chance of it happening again is high. So the brain may think that the chance to see the thing is big. In short, the brain uses the number of times it has seen a thing as an easy way to guess whether the next time will be close.

english_query: If two duties pull you in opposite directions, what do you do? Walk through how to think about a case.
ugf_response:
The person who tells others what to do says that there is no single way to be a good person. They say that being good is something you must always do and never change. This is like making a way for people to live together without hurting each other. The first idea is that the world is made of many different ways to act. Some times are hard because people feel fear. Other times are easy because people want to win or because they have more things. The second idea is that what is right can change when the place and the time change.

The person thinks that because the world changes, the way we should act must also change. They believe that if you are playing a game, you might need to act one way with your friend and a different way with a person who has much power over their body. They think that if you only act one way, you might not be doing what is right when the situation needs you. To show what they mean, if you are always very kind, you might let someone hurt you because you did not stop to be strong. So, they think that to be a person who is good in every way, you must know how to change your way of acting to fit the thing you are doing.

english_query: Why might it be wrong to break a promise even when keeping it leads to a worse outcome overall?
ugf_response: First, we see that each of us has a feeling about what is good and what is bad. Then we can see that the same idea works for us in many different places. This means that being kind or telling the truth does not always help with the way we act with other people. Also we notice that people feel safe with some and feel scared with others, so they may not follow the plan but may break it. Next, we find that if we give more power to keep a word or take away a thing, the big problem comes up, because the other person feels hurt and may stop caring. This shows that the feeling of hurt matters for both of us. Finally, we understand that because all people share these feelings, the whole group wants to stay alive and stay happy, and that is why there, no matter if we think we have a good reason.

You must pick one way to act from what you think is right in front of you. If you pick one way, people will look at you and see things in a certain way. This can change what they do.

The hard question is this: how can we ever be sure that we are making the best choice for the people who make our choices? If the way we show us our choices changes the thing we find out, then we might not be choosing what is really good. We might only be picking what looks better because of how it was shown to us. This makes it very hard to know if we are making a good choice or if we are just being moved by how things are put in front of us.
